title: hieracium bohatschianum subsp. heterodontophyes
intro: Hieracium bohatschianum subsp. heterodontophyes is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), specifically a subspecies of Hieracium bohatschianum. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Hieracium bohatschianum subsp. heterodontophyes include its ability to help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, potentially alleviating symptoms of various health conditions. However, due to limited research, its herbal preparations are not well-documented, but it is often used in traditional medicine as a tincture or infusion.
